stemHtml: Which statement is correct with respect to the range of an NDB?

options.a: In order to double the range of an NDB, the transmission power should be increased with a factor 16.
options.b: With propagation over sea the range will be greater than the range with propagation over land.
options.c: During the night the range of an NDB will decrease due to the interference of the direct- and earth reflected wave.
options.d: The range depends on the altitude of the aircraft.
